# dataLayout

**Instance Property**

Defines the data layout of the input data in the forward pass. See: [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphTensorNamedDataLayout].

## Declaration

```swift
var dataLayout: MPSGraphTensorNamedDataLayout { get set }
```
